_note: Computed styles extracted from live /mi-trabajo (logged in). Editor canvas uses BlockNote (class prefix bn-, bn-inline-content). Shell is plain Tailwind.

layout.page_main: mx-auto w-full max-w-7xl flex-1 px-4 py-6

left_aside.cls: w-full shrink-0 lg:sticky lg:top-20 lg:w-56 lg:self-start

right_aside.cls: w-full shrink-0 lg:sticky lg:top-20 lg:w-72 lg:self-start

tree.header_btn: grid h-8 w-8 place-items-center rounded-lg text-slate-400

editor_toolbar.row: mb-3 flex h-9 shrink-0 items-center gap-1
editor_toolbar.emoji_btn: grid h-8 w-7 place-items-center rounded-lg text-base
editor_toolbar.title_input: min-w-0 flex-1 border-0 bg-transparent p-0 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-800
editor_toolbar.assistant_btn: inline-flex h-8 items-center gap-1.5 rounded-lg px-2 text-xs font-medium text-slate-500

visibility_select.cls: h-8 cursor-pointer rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-2 text-xs text-slate-600

editor_canvas.article: min-h-[70vh] rounded-2xl border border-slate-200/70 bg-white pb-16 pt-...

tasks_panel.header_h2: flex items-center gap-2 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-800 (Tareas)
tasks_panel.header_add_btn: grid h-8 w-8 place-items-center rounded-lg text-slate-400 (＋)
tasks_panel.doc_task_card: card mb-3 border-brand-200/70 bg-brand-50/30 p-3 (DE ESTE DOCUMENTO + Tarea)

help_panel_global._scope: GLOBAL bottom-left, appears on every screen. Belongs to Incidencias/Support phase, not this one.
help_panel_global.title: Mi trabajo (context-named)
elements: Pregunta o cuenta qué falla… input
